category_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/jfernandez/mdserve describes mdserve as a Markdown preview server.
source_facts.description: Fast markdown preview server with live reload and theme support
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface and links Architecture Documentation.
Official repository contains a docs directory referenced by the README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/jfernandez/mdserve; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes zero-config preview, WebSocket live reload, GFM, Mermaid, and directory mode.
source_facts.description mentions markdown preview server, live reload, and theme support
